name: General Knowledge Agent
description: Answers general knowledge questions using a locally-hosted Ollama LLM. Best for open-ended questions, explanations, summaries, and reasoning tasks that do not require database access or document retrieval.

skills.name: General Question Answering
skills.description: Answers open-ended questions, explains concepts, summarises topics, and performs general reasoning using a local Ollama LLM. Use this for any question that does not require live data, database queries, or document search.
examples: What is the difference between authentication and authorisation?
